      ✕ should apply mapper function to transform data (65 ms)
      ✕ should handle multiple items with mapper (104 ms)
    Sorter Integration
      ✕ should apply sorter function to order data (77 ms)
    Description Prop
      ✕ should render description when provided (22 ms)
      ✕ should not render description when omitted (32 ms)
    Variant and Columns Props
      ✕ should apply default variant when not specified (27 ms)
      ✕ should apply domain-linkage variant when specified (24 ms)
      ✕ should apply custom columns when specified (17 ms)
    Real-World Usage Patterns

      ✕ should match MaterialsLayout usage pattern (32 ms)
      ✕ should match SettingsLayout usage pattern (58 ms)
    Edge Cases

      ✕ should handle large datasets (118 ms)
